title: BASELINE-MAP output — id high-water, conventions, seam catalog, oracle inventory

built_by.description: identifier of the pipeline run or spine that produced this baseline map

baseline_aprd_ref.description: path to the frozen aPRD this baseline was built from; null if not applicable

items.description: S* id of an accepted slice

accepted_slices.description: slice ids accepted in the baseline build

items.description: C* id of a built component

built_components.description: component ids built in the baseline

id_high_water.description: max index per id space; downstream mints strictly above

R.description: max R* index minted in baseline

AC.description: max AC* index minted in baseline

S.description: max S* index minted in baseline

ADR.description: max ADR-* index minted in baseline

C.description: max C* index minted in baseline

E.description: max E* index minted in baseline

CT.description: max CT* index minted in baseline

A.description: max A* index minted in baseline

F.description: max F* index minted in baseline

conventions.description: explicit enough for IMPLEMENT to conform; cite source files

lang.description: language and version (cite ADR if applicable)

naming.description: naming conventions for modules, files, packages

integration_seams.description: component boundaries the feature may plug into

at.description: component id C* where the seam lives

kind.description: seam kind: persistence | domain | ingress | primary_external_integration | etc.

contract_ref.description: contract id CT* governing this seam

existing_oracle.description: oracle inventory that must stay green

items.description: path to an oracle suite directory

suites.description: oracle suite paths that must stay green

items.description: test id from an existing oracle suite

inherited_tests.description: specific inherited test ids that must stay green

must_stay_green.description: true when any suite is listed; downstream regression guard reads this

frozen_locks.description: lock path → status; don't recompute hashes

note.description: human-readable context about what this baseline covers and why
